permutation.convention: gate/up rows[perm], down cols[perm]; per-layer independent perm

vllm.gpu_memory_utilization_shared_note: 2026-07-11 13:14: another user's jobs occupy ~26GB of GPU0. Lowered to 0.38 (~18GB) to coexist. Verified gpu_memory_utilization-invariance of correctness: util 0.40 vs 0.90 on Qwen3-4B-Base gsm8k+mmlu gave 0 correctness diffs (3 gsm8k response-text diffs = same chunked-prefill residual), so results at 0.38 and 0.90 are mixable.
vllm.determinism_note: VLLM_BATCH_INVARIANT=1 gives bitwise cross-process determinism on a fixed GPU (probe: gsm8k 0/0). Two RTX 4090s are NOT bit-identical (probe: 28 resp/5 corr diffs), so each model family is pinned to one GPU: all of its baseline and permutation checkpoints run on the same device. Default vLLM was nondeterministic even same-GPU (69 resp/15 corr diffs).

gpu_pinning_note: 2026-07-11: restricted to GPU0 only (GPU1 no longer available). Both families now run on GPU0 for same-device determinism. qwen3_4b_base results previously computed on GPU1 were discarded and recomputed on GPU0 so each family's baseline and permutations share one device.
